events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo to air guitar to?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943, and celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: 83 years young! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched: 45 Years Since 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first music video: The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV's Impact
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was actually released on August 29, 1994, becoming the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Rewind
angles.copy: Throwing it back to Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe'! What's your favourite track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York, defining a generation.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, the Woodstock Festival kicked off. If you could have been there, which artist would you have loved to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Passing
events.blurb: August 16, 2026, marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His music lives on!

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: On this day, we remember the legendary rapper Tupac Shakur, who was tragically shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and passed away six days later.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur today. His impact on music and culture remains undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Passing
events.blurb: September 18, 2026, marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. A true guitar legend.

events.title: The Beatles 'Abbey Road' Album Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Memories
angles.copy: Celebrating the timeless 'Abbey Road' album by The Beatles. Which track takes you back?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951, and celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, the inimitable Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972, and celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for Liam
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune from the rock 'n' roll star?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single on October 11, 1971, with the album following shortly after.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On this day, we reflect on John Lennon's timeless message with 'Imagine'. What does this iconic song mean to you?

events.title: First iPod Released Anniversary
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Nostalgia
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed the game for portable music. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The iconic John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and peace activist, was born on October 9, 1940. He would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The celebrated English actor, comedian, and writer, John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, was born on October 27, 1939, and turns 87 today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles 'White Album' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Reverie
angles.copy: Revisiting The Beatles' iconic 'White Album'. Which track from this sprawling masterpiece is your absolute favourite?
